accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; the description of the amended provision is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content traces to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as establishing a deadline and process for allocation determinations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the amendment to the Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act of 1982.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the Indian lands exclusion and the interest waiver condition.

effective_dates.why: Notes September 20, 2024 as the effective date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers 120-day deadline, interim payment per proposed allocation, correction window, and interest waiver.

concise.why: Appropriately concise for the bill's scope.

correct_entities.why: Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act of 1982 and Secretary of the Interior correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 120-day and third-month deadlines match the bill text.
